# Woosh AI Media — Prompts & Specs

Synthetic media for marketing (see [DECISIONS.md](./DECISIONS.md)). Palette: charcoal `#050A18`, navy `#0A1628`, cyan `#00BFFF`.

## Shared suffix (all stills & video keyframes)

> Premium Indian doorstep vehicle care brand Woosh. Cinematic, realistic, professional uniformed technician, eco-conscious water use, no logos, no text, no watermarks. Color grade: deep charcoal and navy shadows, cyan accent highlights. Photorealistic.

## Storage

**Canonical location:** `C:\Users\kevin\Desktop\Woosh\generated by cursor\`

| Subfolder | Contents |
|-----------|----------|
| `ai-staging/` | Raw AI PNGs before post-process |
| `services/` | 4:5 JPEG tiles |
| `posters/` | 16:9 JPEG posters |
| `videos/hero/` | Hero loop MP4s |
| `videos/` | Detail / carousel MP4s |

The site serves copies from `public/assets/` (synced automatically by the media scripts).

## 4:5 service tiles (`services/`)

| File | Subject | Extra |
|------|---------|-------|
| `car-wash.jpg` | Sedan/SUV foam pre-soak, pressure rinse, driveway | Vertical composition, subject upper two-thirds, dark empty space at bottom for text overlay |
| `bike-wash.jpg` | Sport bike foam wash, wheel and chain visible | Same |
| `auto-wash.jpg` | Auto-rickshaw exterior wash, technician wiping | Same |
| `monthly-packages.jpg` | Car and bike, routine care, subtle calendar motif | Same |
| `daily-cleaning.jpg` | Car interior vacuum, dashboard wipe, fresh cabin | Same |

**Export:** 1200×1500 JPEG. Bottom 45% vignette to charcoal in post-process.

## 16:9 posters (`posters/`)

| File | Subject | Extra |
|------|---------|-------|
| `car-wash-16x9.jpg` | Car wash action, foam and rinse | Wide composition, subject center, darkened edges for navy UI card |
| `bike-wash-16x9.jpg` | Bike wash action | Same |
| `auto-wash-16x9.jpg` | Auto wash at doorstep | Same |
| `monthly-packages-16x9.jpg` | Multiple vehicles, plan/routine feel | Same |
| `daily-cleaning-16x9.jpg` | Interior cleaning wide shot | Same |

**Export:** 1920×1080 JPEG. Edge vignette toward navy `#0A1628`.

## Hero loops (`videos/hero/`)

| File | Duration | Creative |
|------|----------|----------|
| `car-wash-action.mp4` | 8–12s | Tight foam/rinse/wipe, loop-friendly, silent |
| `bike-wash-action.mp4` | 8–12s | Same for bike |
| `auto-wash-action.mp4` | 8–12s | Same for auto |
| `monthly-hero-action.mp4` | 8–12s | Routine multi-vehicle care |

**Tech:** 1920×1080 H.264, ≤4 MB, no audio, `+faststart`.

## Detail / carousel (`videos/`)

| File | Duration | Creative |
|------|----------|----------|
| `car-wash-and-care.mp4` | 25–40s | Arrival → wash → shine reveal |
| `bike-wash-and-care.mp4` | 25–40s | Same arc |
| `auto-wash-and-care.mp4` | 25–40s | Same arc |
| `monthly-packages.mp4` | 25–40s | Booking/plan + wash montage |
| `daily-cleaning-services.mp4` | 25–40s | Interior care sequence |

**Tech:** 1920×1080 H.264, ≤12 MB, optional subtle ambient audio.

## Post-process (automated)

Run from repo root:

```bash
# Place raw PNGs in Desktop/Woosh/generated by cursor/ai-staging/
pnpm process:posters   # writes to generated by cursor/, syncs to public/assets
pnpm generate:videos
pnpm sync:media        # manual sync only if needed
```

Scripts: `scripts/process-posters.mjs`, `scripts/generate-videos.mjs`, `scripts/sync-media-to-public.mjs`.
